en.value: 1. Collaborate with local governments and support target communities to plan and establishClimate Smart/Climate Adapted Village to upscale climate smart agriculture technologies andpractice.2. Training on climate smart agriculture technologies and practices for women, farmers, andlocal government staff3. Promote and support for climate resilient technologies and crop varieties in agriculture.4. Enhance livestock production (including support, animal health care, housing)5. Improved water management and irrigation systems6. Improve nutrition through establishment of home gardens and school biodiversity gardens.7. Training and support for small scale farm and enterprises8. Training and support for returnee migrants, persons with disability and women to engagein income generation activities.9. Provide skill development training on management, business and market management.10. Development of agricultural products11. Developing access to market via cooperatives, and enhancing capacity of small-scalefarmers and microenterprises12. Establishment of collection centers to support collection and processing of marketproducts produced by beneficiaries.13. Create connections and enable environment for microenterprises with officials.14. Develop training materials and build capacity of teachers via trainings and supervision onpsychosocial wellbeing and disability inclusive education.15. Develop and provide training material/ technical support for classroom based onpsychosocial wellbeing and for establishment of psychosocial counselling unit at schools.16. Develop comprehensive school counselling manual in collaboration with CEHRD andprovinces, and roll it out.17. Parenting education on child wellbeing, child protection and education of children18. Support children with disability and people with disability to attend and graduate fromhigher level education (grade 11 and 12, bachelor and master)19. Improve schools’ infrastructure to promote disability-friendly learning environment.21. Increase access of children with disabilities to nutritious food, health and sanitary toimprove their education results.22. Provide mental health and psychosocial counselling training and supervision toparamedics, staff nurse/auxiliary nurse, with emphasis on children’s psychosocial issues.23. Provide advanced psychosocial counselling training/supervision to staff nurses of referralhospitals to provide psychosocial counselling services for the referred cases from schools.24.
